title: Visitor Pattern with Enums
description: In Rust, the visitor pattern is naturally expressed using enums and match. Instead of the OOP double-dispatch visitor, Rust uses enum variants to represent different node types and match expressions to dispatch behavior. This is simpler, type-safe, and the compiler ensures all variants are handled (exhaustive matching).
whenToUse: Walking tree or graph structures with different node types
When you need multiple operations over a fixed set of types
realWorldUse: syn crate (Rust proc-macro AST walking), serde's data model (Deserializer visits), regex-syntax crate (regex AST), any compiler or interpreter built in Rust.
